claim_boundary: Host-side NEST diagnostic of lifecycle diversity at long timescale only. Not mechanism promotion, not baseline freeze, not hardware evidence, not public usefulness proof.

contract.claim_boundary: Host-side NEST diagnostic of lifecycle diversity at long timescale only. Not mechanism promotion, not baseline freeze, not hardware evidence, not public usefulness proof.
contract.diagnosis: All 5 lifecycle mechanisms show positive-but-small PR margins (+0.1-0.16) at 400 steps. Each creates real architectural diversity (5.1x tau_m std growth, 48% unique masks, 20 allocation profiles, 170+ inherited connections) but the per-polyp PR metric is dominated by population-size inflation until enough generations pass for accumulated divergence to create genuinely orthogonal activity patterns.
contract.hypothesis: At 8000 steps, the full lifecycle stack (neural + stream + allocation + fitness + synaptic heritability) will produce per-polyp PR that significantly exceeds the static baseline by more than 0.5, because 8k steps provides 40+ generations of reproduction with compounded trait divergence.

measurement.pr_metric: per-polyp activity_rate covariance PR on last 40% of steps

contract.null_hypothesis: PR does not significantly exceed static baseline at 8000 steps because (1) the PR plateau is architectural, not timescale-bound, (2) population size dominates PR regardless of trait diversity, or (3) the per-generation effects are too small to compound meaningfully even at 40+ generations.

outcome_classes.action: Lifecycle diversity compounds at evolutionary timescale. Lock as evidence.
outcome_classes.condition: primary pass AND all secondary pass

outcome_classes.action: Diversity helps but not cleanly. Continue investigation.
outcome_classes.condition: primary pass but not all secondary

outcome_classes.action: PR is bounded by architecture, not timescale. Rethink mechanism.
outcome_classes.condition: PR does not increase with steps (trajectory flat)
Population crashes, NaN, or infinite values

pass_criteria.primary: lifecycle_full per-polyp PR > static_uniform per-polyp PR by margin > 0.5 at final timepoint (8000 steps)
secondary: At least 10 unique allocation profiles at final timepoint
Neural factor std exceeds 0.5 at final timepoint

contract.question: At 8000 steps with full lifecycle stack (all 5 diversity mechanisms enabled), does the organism's per-polyp PR exceed the static uniform baseline by more than 0.5, demonstrating that per-generation diversity effects compound into measurable state diversity at evolutionary timescales?

criteria.name: primary pass: margin > 0.5
criteria.value: lifecycle_full per-polyp PR > static_uniform per-polyp PR by margin > 0.5 at final timepoint (8000 steps)

tier: Tier 5.31 — Long-Run Lifecycle Diversity Diagnostic Contract
